steps.title: AI Guardrails
steps.text: Surgewave AI Guardrails provide layered content safety for AI pipelines. Five guardrail types can be composed into a pipeline that evaluates, redacts, and blocks unsafe content.

steps.title: The IGuardrail Interface
steps.text: Every guardrail implements IGuardrail with an EvaluateAsync method. Results include pass/fail status, a list of violations, sanitized content, severity level, and evaluation duration.

steps.title: PII Detection and Toxicity Filtering
steps.text: PiiDetector finds 6 PII types (email, phone, credit card, SSN, IP, IBAN) using compiled regex and replaces them with typed placeholders. ToxicityFilter blocks harmful terms using word-boundary matching.

steps.title: GuardrailPipeline
steps.text: Chain guardrails in sequence with GuardrailPipeline. Sanitized content flows from one guardrail to the next, producing a final result with total violation count, highest severity, and safe content ready for downstream use.
